title: Sanji Returns to Luffy
description: On pages 8–11, this part focuses on Capone Bege, Jinbe, Big Mom, Bege as Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the assassination plot against Big Mom begins taking shape.
scene: Sanji and Luffy reunite emotionally, turning the rescue mission into a direct conspiracy against Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: Inside BEGE's Hideout Women's Bath

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Eeeee--!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Lola became a zombie boar!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And then she would chase after the man she liked...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Round and round...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that time... and this time in the monster forest too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ahahaha, that's just like Lola!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't want to think about what would have happened to me if I hadn't met Lola.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see!! But to my younger sister, you are Saviours!! Thank you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm so happy that tears are flowing out!! We used to be like "One mind in two bodies", being twins and all!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Dead people who can move?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: the sea is a wonderland

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That's right.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So Lola was able to return to her human form!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure that she is doing well now as a pirate!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder if she's found someone to marry yet.

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Big Mom's fury was like a demon's,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: When she ran away from the marriage...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Haha... that was a huge incident.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: for a certain reason, Mama is hated...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: by all the giants in the world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that is why there are no giants in Totto Land, where all races reside.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Eh? By the Giants??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Giants....!! They really exist....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One day... a Suitor who fell in love at first sight...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: with Lola appeared, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was none other than Prince "Lok!" from the country of Giants, "Elbaf"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...a prince!? Amazing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: MAMA WAS BESIDE HERSELF WITH JOY! CRYING TEARS OF DELIGHT!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If Lola became the princess of Elbaf, Mama would have been able to bury their long years of conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Furthermore, she would have been able to take control of the military of Elbaf...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The country known as the strongest in the whole world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see...so she escaped from all of that.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It got even worse after that. They tried to use me as Lola's substitute, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They found out that I wasn't Lola...and the relationship with the giants became even worse.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After that, Mama gave up on becoming allies with the real giant race,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and started to invest into research about gigantification...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Her rage towards Lola grew greater and greater.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lola is consider- red a criminal in this country! She would be killed if she came back.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In addition... it seems that she also dislikes me because I look exactly like Lola.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Anyone seems

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Don't you dare show that face!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: every time we met...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: In front of me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: she would cruelly beat me. I had in- juries that did not heal for many years.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Eeh!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought that I was going to be killed... by my own parent...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can no longer think of that "monster" as my mother.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Lola is very care- free, so...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She probably doesn't even im- aging that her mother bears kill- ing intent towards her.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Haha...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I see... everything... makes sense now....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When Bege said that he was going to assassination Mama,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I didn't feel anything...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It might seem terrible... but it's the truth.

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Sanji Returns storyline with 55 dialogue beats. Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the crew joins Bege’s risky plan to attack Big Mom during the tea party.
